title: An eye-opener for all States: Supreme Court on UP IAS officers' inaction on demolition orders
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday observed that the ongoing litigation regarding the failure of Uttar Pradesh government authorities to act against unauthorised commercial buildings should serve as a wake-up call for States across the country. A Bench of Justices JB Pardiwala and KV Viswanathan noted that the crisis, which recently necessitated the emergency sealing of schools and hospitals, could have been avoided if officials had acted with greater diligence."Had the authoritie
